name: finuslugi-3d-visual-pipeline
description: Controlled reference-to-image production pipeline for governed and validated Finuslugi 3D visual assets.

interface.longDescription: Analyze visual references, compile a versioned Scene Specification, validate governed assets, route through an explicit image-runtime capability profile, generate or edit an image, diagnose deviations, and deliver a regression-checked Finuslugi asset.
defaultPrompt: Use the Finuslugi 3D visual pipeline to turn my reference into a governed, style-consistent, validated image.
